def negative_error_message_embeds_sensitive_data():
    rule_id = "error_message_embeds_sensitive_data"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Exception message or error response string interpolated with credentials, keys, or PII."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
